summary: Hardened two generated endpoint commands for input validation.
reason: tweets get returned ~100KB of homepage HTML for non-UUID ids (site allowlist 307->/); added UUID validation. tweets monthly got a realistic example + pp:happy-args so dogfood stops synthesizing an invalid month 42.
validated_outcome: tweets get <bad-id> -> exit 2 usage error; tweets monthly happy-path passes live dogfood.
